events.appearance_notes: Observed event; A black car was surrounded by several police officers and a man wearing short sleeves.
events.event_text: From 0.0s to 15.1s, a black car was surrounded by several police officers and a man wearing short sleeves.

events.appearance_notes: Observed event; The short-sleeved man pulled out a gun and shot the policeman in front of him, then ran away.
events.event_text: From 15.1s to 18.7s, the short-sleeved man pulled out a gun and shot the policeman in front of him, then ran away.

events.appearance_notes: Low activity; The policeman standing next to the black car raised his gun and shot in the direction of the short-sleeved man's escape.
events.event_text: From 17.6s to 20.4s, the policeman standing next to the black car raised his gun and shot in the direction of the short-sleeved man's escape.
